_comment: Copy this file to config/legal.json and fill in only what you need. config/legal.json is git-ignored, so your personal data never enters the repository. Each page is independent: if it isn't configured, its route returns 404 and no footer link appears — the page simply does not exist.
_impressum: Enabled when name + address + email are all filled. Page: /impressum
_datenschutz: Enabled when enabled=true. Page: /datenschutz. email + logRetentionDays fill the privacy notice; extra is optional free HTML-less text.
